title: Maximum Number of Operations With the Same Score II
titleCn: 相同分数的最大操作数目 II

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1,2,3,4] Output: 3 Explanation: We perform the following operations: - Delete the first two elements, with score 3 + 2 = 5, nums = [1,2,3,4]. - Delete the first and the last elements, with score 1 + 4 = 5, nums = [2,3]. - Delete the first and the last elements, with score 2 + 3 = 5, nums = []. We are unable to perform any more operations as nums is empty.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We perform the following operations: - Delete the first two elements, with score 3 + 2 = 5, nums = [1,2,3,4]. - Delete the first and the last elements, with score 1 + 4 = 5, nums = [2,3]. - Delete the first and the last elements, with score 2 + 3 = 5, nums = []. We are unable to perform any more operations as nums is empty.

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,6,1,4] Output: 2 Explanation: We perform the following operations: - Delete the first two elements, with score 3 + 2 = 5, nums = [6,1,4]. - Delete the last two elements, with score 1 + 4 = 5, nums = [6]. It can be proven that we can perform at most 2 operations.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We perform the following operations: - Delete the first two elements, with score 3 + 2 = 5, nums = [6,1,4]. - Delete the last two elements, with score 1 + 4 = 5, nums = [6]. It can be proven that we can perform at most 2 operations.
